profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama Baseline
profiles.description: Public baseline for the projected-feed multi-layer Colorama quad scene. Mirrors the authored scene defaults from Dynamic Oscillatory Pattern Entrainment for the current bundled APK.

profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama Quality
profiles.description: Higher-intensity projected-feed Colorama variant with slightly wider overlay coverage and stronger gradient/displacement motion for supervised scene iteration.
